title: LOVECASA, Bamboo Placemat 6 Pcs, Washable Placemats, Non-Slip, Heat Resistant Table Mat
features: DIMENSIONS AND PACKAGE OF NAPKINS: The size of the placemats is 45 x 30 cm. Set of 6 placemats. High-end design rugs would be the best decoration and protection for your tables

HIGH QUALITY BAMBOO MATERIAL: This anti-friction table mat has been approved by FDA as eco-friendly kitchen accessories, high quality bamboo product, very durable, easy to clean, does not fade. You can safely use it at the table

HIGH TEMPERATURE RESISTANCE: The effective insulation of these tablecloths can reach 80℃, their heat resistance is effective, which can protect your table from heat and create a pleasant atmosphere during meals. Family

EASY TO CLEAN: The set of 6 mats is washable, mildew resistant, easy to clean, used at the table, in the kitchen or in the hotel, providing a more efficient cleaning work. You can wash these woven tablecloths or simply wipe them clean

PERFECT DECORATION: The non-slip insulated placemats and coasters are full of style, they will be a beautiful decoration and improve the quality of life of home, dining room, kitchen, hotel and commercial offices
